backward_compatibility.rationale: User confirmed: no backward compat needed. Frontend is snapshot-only. Legacy view files are not consumed by anything.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: User confirmed: remove old code. _update_indexes_flat, _update_collection_indexes, _update_indexes to be deleted.

inventory_strategy.rationale: Keep separate slug-keyed counters (level_slug_counts, tag_slug_counts) alongside ShardEntry construction. InventoryUpdate expects slug keys — do not derive from numeric IDs.
